progress_summary: v1.5.0 'Build the AI app' SHIPPED + LIVE (2026-06-22). app-architect's v1.5 contribution — the 'AI app?' branch in Phase 2 /oc-discover that routes to the four AI-native skills (oc-claude-api hub, oc-rag-forge, oc-agent-forge, oc-prompt-ops) and feeds an 11-ai-architecture.md spec doc — shipped in Sprint 2 (PR #303). No app-architect action pending; v1.6 ('Cost & telemetry') is the next theme, no tickets cut yet. HISTORY: v1.3 shipped 2026-05-08 (526a9a2). v1.4 fully shipped since then via stack-forge's ADEV-328 → ADEV-337 chain — PRs 1-8 all merged: pack registry architecture (PR 1, ADEV-328), 5-pack backfill (PR 2, ADEV-329), deploy-ops dispatcher + api-dev pack-read flow (PR 3, ADEV-330), modern web bulk (PR 4, ADEV-334), enterprise bulk (PR 5, ADEV-335), Apple/iOS (PR 6, ADEV-336), mobile bulk Android/Flutter/RN (PR 6.5, ADEV-343), hosting adapters (PR 7, ADEV-337), site surfaces + version cut (PR 8, ADEV-331). v1.4.0 is live. app-architect held the orchestration role through v1.3 and handed off cleanly; the v1.4 cycle was stack-forge-led with no app-architect intervention required. v1.5 ("Build the AI app") is now in the planning phase — ADEV-344 parent + 5 sprint children (ADEV-345/346/347/348/349) — adds 4 AI-native skills (claude-api, rag-forge, agent-forge, prompt-ops). Per the roadmap docs at roadmap/07 + roadmap/08. app-architect picks up active orchestration for v1.5 only if Sprint 2+ runs into cross-skill coordination questions that stack-forge can't resolve alone.

progress_table.label: Sprint 3: Platform expansion (Django / Rails / Go / Rust)
Manual deploy: staging eyeball → prod (live at 526a9a2)

key_decisions: Theme: A (Runtime PM-MCP) primary, E (platform expansion) secondary, B (release-ops 18th skill) tertiary.
Hero scenario: ticket→ship→incident→postmortem on a single Linear thread (closes the v1.2 prose-vs-runtime gap visibly).
Three new scenarios match v1.2 cadence: runtime-pm-loop (hero) + release-ops-dogfood + django-render-shipped.
Add 18th skill: release-ops. Sits between git-ops and deploy-ops at release boundaries.
Carry-over from v1.2: Playwright e2e for /changelog + the three v1.2 scenarios; LHCI warn assertions on new pages.
All 18 skill versions bump 1.2.0 → 1.3.0; styleguide badge v1.2.0 → v1.3.0; homepage pill v1.2 → v1.3.
Backwards-compatible release; no flag changes, no auth changes, no platform migration.
user_preferences: Picks options when given clear choices; comfortable with 'go with defaults'.
Prefers sharp scoping questions, then approves big plans in one pass (re-confirmed for v1.3).
Wants a hero scenario per release; comfortable with bigger 4-sprint releases when scope is well-defined.
Manual deploy from wrangler-logged-in laptop is the rule; CI is verification-only.

next_actions: No app-architect work pending — v1.5 'Build the AI app' shipped + live (the AI-app /oc-discover branch landed in PR #303).
Next theme is v1.6 'Cost & telemetry' (roadmap/07). app-architect picks up if a future app build hits a cross-skill coordination question the leaf skills can't resolve.

carry_over_from_v12: playwright e2e for /changelog and v1.2 scenarios
skill_state.depends_on: v1.2 release shipped; .opchain/pm.yaml exists with provider=linear team=ADEV
